description: The binding of a hinagata clause (or template) to an ACTUAL public statute / instrument (per ADR-2606111954) — the EDN `:cites-statute` / `:mandated-by` 縁 of the legal-template-ontology, surfaced as an append-only record. This is the link that makes a template traceable to real law rather than free-floating boilerplate. A citation is a DISCLOSED STRUCTURAL FACT (this clause rests on this article), sourced from the instrument or its official guidance, with the public official source URL recorded — NEVER a hinagata verdict that the clause is valid, sufficient, or enforceable in any jurisdiction (N3 / G1).

subjectId.description: The hinagata clause or template this citation binds (`cl.*` / `tmpl.*`).

statuteCitation.description: Canonical public citation, e.g. `GDPR Art. 28` / `民法601条` / `CISG Art. 35`.

instrument.description: The instrument the article belongs to, e.g. `Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR)` / `借地借家法`.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166 code, a bloc (`EU`), or `INTL` for treaties / model laws.

force.description: DISCLOSED citation force — `mandated` (the statute requires the clause), `cited` (the clause rests on / references the article), or `referenced` (informational). A disclosed structural fact, never a verdict (N3).

bindingLoad.description: Disclosed strength of the statutory anchoring as a decimal string in [0,1] (the EDN `:en/binding-load`). Karma lives on this edge (N1).

sourceUrl.description: PUBLIC official source (legislation.gov / EUR-Lex / e-Gov / treaty depositary). The disclosed primary, never a paywalled secondary (Rider §2(e)).
